## Summary

Map **API errors to user-friendly dapp copy** — replace raw server messages in `wallet-auth-card.tsx` and dashboard with actionable Spanish/English strings.

---

## Problem

#11 documents that production auth shows generic or raw API errors:
- `401 Invalid wallet signature` — no guidance
- `500 Internal Server Error` — often means missing `DATABASE_URL` (#15)
- `503 On-chain attestation unavailable` — technical env var names

Users cannot self-serve troubleshooting.

---

## Proposed implementation

**File:** `Front/lib/api-errors.ts`

```typescript
export function mapApiError(status: number, message?: string): UserFacingError {
  // Returns { title, description, action?, code }
}
```

**Error map (initial):**

| Status + pattern | User message |
|------------------|--------------|
| 401 + signature | "No pudimos verificar tu firma. Revisa la red de tu wallet e intenta de nuevo." |
| 404 + user | "Wallet no registrada. Usa Registrarse primero." |
| 500 | "Servicio temporalmente no disponible. Intenta en unos minutos." |
| 503 + attestation | "Attestation on-chain no configurada aún." |
| 429 | "Demasiados intentos. Espera un momento." (#42) |

**Apply in:**
- `Front/components/wallet-auth-card.tsx`
- `Front/app/dashboard/attestation/page.tsx`
- `Front/lib/api-client.ts` (optional central wrapper)

**i18n:** Use plain strings now; migrate keys when #40 lands

---

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] No raw `error.message` from API shown directly to users
- [ ] Each mapped error has title + description
- [ ] Unknown errors fall back to generic safe message (not stack traces)
- [ ] Unit tests for `mapApiError` cases
- [ ] README troubleshooting links to common errors

---

## Related

- #11 auth UX
- #15 production 500 errors
- #40 i18n (future migration)

---

## Out of scope

- Localized API error messages from Server
- Toast notification system refactor
